description: Deterministic native Mission/Wave/Agent Team pressure state for visual-contract capture.
invariants: Wave 1 is completed and accepted with an accepted attempt.
Wave 2 is running on retry Attempt 2 with a pending Wave gate.
Four MemberRuns include running, reviewing, and blocked pressure states.
The current TeamRun records its execution root; member snapshots record actual cwd, Git identity, and discovered path roots only.
A member worktree override may live outside the project path while older TeamRuns remain readable without workspace fields.
Assignments use stable correlation ids and evidence refs without a dependency graph.
No durable thinking row exists; live preview must be injected after SSE connects.
